goal: Package the proven book-RAG spike as a lean platform layer (generic embed + vector primitives, modeled on AudioInterpreter/ImageInterpreter) + a math-app domain packaged as platform jobs+artifacts. Reuse spike branch code. No local scripts.

orchestration.token_policy: Explore-scouts return compact briefs; implementers get tight briefs + reuse spike code; fork only to inherit an established compact context; follow-ons via SendMessage on same session; no agent re-explores the repo.
orchestration.mechanism: Agent tool (Explore | general-purpose | fork subagent types) + SendMessage re-engagement
orchestration.topology_note: nodes = agents; parent = who spawned/forked; spawn = 'fresh' | 'fork' | 'resume'; this file is the authoritative tree + session-id store.

nodes.finding: audio/vision pattern mapped; NO existing embed/vector; PR-3 doc FORBIDS platform vector store -> add only a generic EmbeddingsInterpreter provider helper, vector store is domain-owned
new package packages/math-book (default runtime); file template mapped; node->provider call pattern; jobs book_index + book_retrieve

nodes.result: embeddings.py (embed_text + EmbeddingsInterpreter + EmbeddingResult), 12 tests pass, additive; now on ai-platform main

nodes.pr: sepoul/math-app#65 (MERGED to main; full domain package v0.3.0)

history.result: book_index nodes ported (extraction/graph/chunk-embed); real local run 108 nodes/809 edges/107 chunks; live tenant-DB knn round-trip + real embed ranking; math_book_chunks pgvector wired

book_retrieve = spike C_full ported (hybrid vector+lexical FTS+type/label+section-demote, intent-gated expand, claude-haiku-4-5 rerank); local §7 queries return correct source-traceable units; +BookRetrievalArtifact; v0.3.0

nodes.result: deployed book_index+book_retrieve@0.3.0 + 3 artifact-types @localhost:8000; REBUILT worker image (pre-merge image lacked the Embedder); smoke PASS: 270 nodes/1917 edges/268 chunks, all queries source-traceable; deployed page-aware recall@5 0.808 / MRR 0.830 / trace 1.000; naive view collapses to 0 label+trace (spike finding reproduced); SDK regen done (9 book types; pre-existing tsc drift -> ai-platform#78)

verdict: Integration validated end-to-end on the deployed platform. Packaged pipeline reproduces the spike headline: structure wins, naive collapses to 0 on label+traceability. Slight numeric gap vs frozen spike is explained + non-regression (broader slice + strict-join on pre-freeze gold ids).

token_accounting.note: whole integration ~948K subagent tokens; recon kept compact (Explore briefs) + domain used session-continue (its own context) instead of forking the orchestrator's large context

edges.kind: resume(#63,#64 via SendMessage — session-continue, context inherited)
